programme.title: Xplash Ep103

programme.title: Surfing Lifestyle Ep105: California’s Ideal Surf Spots
programme.desc: When you get a collective of six of the world's hottest junior surfers together for a road trip down the coastal highway of California, expectations are tetering on nuclear for some high octane performance surfing.

programme.title: Blue World Ep809: Honduran Sea Turtles + Shangri-La Cave
programme.desc: Blue World heads to Roatan, in Honduras, to meet the local population of sea turtles, where he witnesses an altercation over delicious sponges and ways in which fish steal food from turtles. Then we explore an incredibly tight and dangerous cave in Florida.

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep208: 750-Nautical Mile Run in a “Starter Boat”…Montreal to Manhattan
programme.desc: Water Ways TV's host, Steven Bull, completes the 750-nautical mile run in the “starter boat” going from Montreal to Manhattan.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep112: Deep White - Why Sharks Attack
programme.desc: Deep White explores ways to research sharks to determine why sharks attack and to study innovative ways to train sharks in order to prevent future attacks. Sharks are surprisingly intelligent and able to perform complex tasks. Sharks can distinguish different signals and cues in feeding routines and they develop strong bonds with their trainers.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep114: Aquabike World Championship Series - Qingdao, China
programme.desc: The UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship is in Qingdao, China, for the Grand Prix of Qingdoa, featuring the Aquabike Jetski Division.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep311: Surfing The Barrel – Australia (Part 2)
programme.desc: World of Watersports catches up with some of the world's best surfers as they discuss the sport they love and their passion regarding surfing the barrel.

programme.title: Water Matters Ep106: Sustainable Fishing, Ocean Planning
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.desc: Enjoy a high-quality relaxation video that brings the beauty of nature to your space. With stunning visuals of towering mountains, lush forests, and flowing rivers, this film transports you to serene landscapes, accompanied by calming music and the peaceful sounds of nature.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: In 2015 Audi presented a facelift for their city racer A1. We put this compact to the test. Also: it's a tough competition in the compact class, and Renault and Peugeot also want a piece of the pie. We compared the Renault Twingo and the Peugeot 108.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Over the decades compact and city cars have become more and more popular, especially in urban areas. We took a look at three examples for these modern lifestyle vehicles, the 5-door Mini, the Opel Adam Rocks and the Kia Soul EV.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: The Custombike show in Bad Salzuflen, Germany, is one of the leading fairs for exclusive motorcycles in Europe and a hub for news and trends in the motorbike scene. From choppers, to cruisers, street fighters to classic bikes, Harleys to Japanese motorcycles, this show always offers something exciting for every taste and age.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Stunt world champion Chris Pfeiffer test drives the BMW F 800 R and explains why he is rather excited about the performance and handling of this robust and agile roadster. Also: a look behind the scenes of German helmet manufacturer Schuberth Helme's testing and development procedures. And: German actor Jürgen Vogel puts his new Ducati 1198 SP to the test at the Nürburgring.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Nürburgring Nordschleife is known as the toughest speedway in the world. Together with race driver Hans-Joachim Stuck we take a look at the history of this iconic race track as well as the events and record attempts that have been taking place there.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: What are the characteristics of a typical German car? Do stereotypes like functionality, reliability but also a certain dullness paint a realistic picture? Also, we explored if the Volkswagen Golf GTE could bring new impulses to the brand's model range.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.desc: The "Walk" at JBR in Dubai is the venue for our competition, as far as fancy and luxurious cars from all over the Middle East are concerned. This time, a Lamborghini Aventador and a GMC Chevrolet are among the participants.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.desc: Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi once again invite the owners of the most extraordinary cars to Dubai, where they award points for speed, style and sound. This time, they will be joined by a limited edition Mercedes SLS and an Audi R8.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Functional transporters offer high payload and lots of storage space, and the new Volkswagen Crafter is no exception. How does it fare in comparison to the iconic Mercedes Sprinter? Also: the nearly indestructible and also iconic Unimog by Mercedes.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: The S version of the Jaguar F-Pace is a tough competitor for Porsche Macan Turbo other rivals. Also: Audi launched its SQ7 as the most powerful diesel SUV on the market. And: the Bentley Bentayga, the first luxury class SUV in the world.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Ferrari 458 Speciale is a street-legal race car that fires up emotion. Driving it is unforgettable, just as it is the case with the McLaren 650S, a car that is as fast as the Ferrari but fascinates more on a technical than emotional level.

programme.title: The Night Before Christmas
programme.desc: Well, a mouse *is* stirring... And he's having fun playing with the toys, until he mistakes Tom for a stuffed toy and wakes him up

programme.desc: We look at the art of preparing a snowboard for freestyle in the big mountains, and we bring you spectacular action of this kind on skis from Chamonix, with the best moments of the finals of the Freeside World Tour.

programme.title: Begging For Change
programme.desc: This movie is about the lives of strange and exhilarating men, begging for change, and living a life that is fast, cheap, and affordable. All the things that make up a great ski movie

programme.title: Chaiyo Premiere Tour
programme.desc: A skate documentary following a 10-day tour across Thailand, featuring demos and premieres in several cities, capturing the energy of local skate scenes and the passion of skaters coming together to celebrate.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: Tour De France à La Voile - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1978, the Tour de France à la voile has allowed thousands of sailors to discover the French coast. This yachting race is held in July every year and links the English Channel to the French Riviera. The tour is a great offshore sailing school for amateur sailors, and a high-level competition for the great champions taking part.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 1 - Nelson Mandela Pro
programme.desc: The first event of the South African WQS during series kicks off in Nelson Mandela Bay. Challenging conditions make it even tougher for surfers to get the vital points they need to advance. Will they have what it takes to raise to the top? Don’t miss all the action, the disappointments and victories at the start of what will be an epic African series.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the 2021 GC32 Racing Tour. You are about to see all of the foiling action from Lagos on Portugal's beautiful Algarve! As usual, on the GC32 Racing Tour each venue has been selected to provide the best conditions for the nimble GC32s to fly at 30+ knots speeds. But - spoiler alert... in this episode you'll see them racing at almost 40 knots! Lagos is once more in the center of the sailing universe with the GC32 Lagos Cup 2. Appropriately coinciding with the Olympic Games, the event included some of the sailing's leading names, including several multiple Olympic medallists.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Holistay
programme.desc: Two couples, who do not know each other, double book a vacation house in San Diego and strange events begin to happen. "Things are not as they appear."

programme.title: Antisocial Behaviour
programme.desc: Jakob Kelser is a man with a horrific, troubled past. Having been failed by society and plagued by a gruesome childhood memory, he is forced to live alone in the unholy hell of God's making.

programme.title: Pillow Party Massacre
programme.desc: Haunted by a prank gone fatally wrong, five friends reunite to heal. But not all can forget, and it's clear that someone or something is out for revenge.

programme.title: Weekend Killer
programme.desc: Detective's Joey Moretti and Patricia Stevens are trying to track down a serial killer that preys on young attractive women, leaving only cryptic messages carved into their flesh as clues! Joey struggles to keep himself together as the investigation leads him closer and closer to the deranged killer!

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E39 - A Century Of The Queen Mother 100 Years In 100 Minutes
programme.desc: 100 years of celebration in 100 minutes

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E05 - Masters of Attack
programme.desc: Carnivores can't just pick their meals off trees. To survive, they have to use every trick they've got to catch food that's just as keen on staying alive as they are. If their prey hides, they have to find it. If it runs, they must chase it. They have to track it if it's hard to pin down and beat it if it fights back. The predator might use its strength for the final blow, but the real effort lies in the strategy.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E05 - Counting Shells
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers spend a lot of time enforcing the laws of waterfowl hunting; using canoes they work silently across the state's largest game area; it's not all work as one officer oversees a class trip to the pheasant field.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E06 - Shed Hunting
programme.desc: Looking for antlers on opening day is like Christmas for shed hunters; a few are willing to break the law for a crack at a monster shed; Montana wardens are on the look out for one offender who is no stranger to a run-in with the law.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E04 - Badge Bust and Beluga Whale
programme.desc: In 'Badge Bust,' one badge's over confidence gets another badge in trouble. Meanwhile, 'Beluga Whale' tells the story of a sea creature far from home that's quite the adventure.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E05 - North Coast and Seat Belt
programme.desc: Game Wardens take on one of the biggest cases ever in Ohio's Division of Wildlife's 146-year history. They must figure out what happened when a bunch of people break the law. In "Seat Belt," a routine traffic stop leads to a surprising find.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S01:E03 - Deadman's Survival
programme.desc: Island Air battles time and the elements, to rescue a group trapped in Deadman's Bay.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S01:E04 - Desperate Times
programme.desc: Island Air drops off a group of desperate hunters in the heart of the bush as a deep freeze hits Kodiak.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E42 - Diana A Model Princess
programme.desc: Diana's fashion sense was something people often looked at closely. She had a knack for picking outfits that were both stylish and sophisticated, which always grabbed attention. Her hats were another standout feature; she often wore elegant designs that added a touch of grace to her look. Her hair was also iconic, usually styled neatly with a slight bounce, perfectly framing her face and adding to her elegant appearance.

programme.title: Forces
programme.desc: Under the crushing emotional burden of his terminally ill father and violent brother, 14-year-old Daniel seeks refuge with two outcasts.

programme.title: Talk to Me
programme.desc: When a mother and her daughter take a vacation at the Baltic Sea, it quickly turns into a journey into the past that opens up old wounds.

programme.title: Youth Topia
programme.desc: In a world driven by algorithms, a group of "forever teenagers" rebel against the dictates of self-optimization.

programme.title: Berlin Excelsior
programme.desc: The anonymous Berlin concrete building "Excelsior" is only a temporary stop for its residents, yet some have been living there for more than 50 years.

programme.title: Everything Always All the Time
programme.desc: What happens when your girlfriend suddenly has a penis?

programme.title: Lost in the Living
programme.desc: A young Irish musician immerses himself into Berlin nightlife after a concert and loses more than just his friends in the process.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alice and the Vampire Queen
programme.desc: Alice Oldman is an ex-con struggling to overcome the scars from her past. Then one night a dark stranger gives her an offer she cannot refuse. Make one special dish for his boss, the Vampire Queen.

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: A Dream Called Death
programme.desc: An introvert and Schizophrenic young man finds the "Perfect Cure" to his mental illness in the form of a damsel whom he considers to be the "Woman of his dream," but his dream somewhat turns out to be a nightmare for him and everyone around him!

programme.title: A Tiger in Winter
programme.desc: On a winter day, when a tiger escapes from the zoo, a man is kicked out of his girlfriend's house. Having no place to go, he wanders from here to there while working as a substitute driver and meets his old girlfriend.

programme.title: Adam and Evelyn
programme.desc: Summer 1989, East Germany. Adam works as a tailor, Evelyn as a waitress. They are planning a vacation together when Evelyn finds out that Adam is cheating on her and decides to leave for the holiday on her own.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Stage Fright
programme.desc: Will Lizzy and Co. be able to unmask the culprit, or will it be curtains for the theater department?

programme.title: Stage Fright
programme.desc: It's dress rehearsal for the Crown Lake drama club, and one student becomes the victim of a tragic accident.

programme.title: Crown Lake
programme.desc: Nellie and Josh hit it off until she learns about long-standing and controversial rule during Treasure Hunt.

programme.title: Crown Lake
programme.desc: After the Scavenger Hunt debacle, Nellie returns to Crown Lake with a vengeance.

programme.title: Total Eclipse
programme.desc: Embarrassed by an old photo, Diana vows to get revenge at her big party.

programme.title: Total Eclipse
programme.desc: When Kate casts a love spell, the girls’ relationships start to change.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Harmony helps Rhyme make up her mind, and Flash goes out for the team.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: In the season finale, the Attaway team faces stiff competition.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: It's a new year in Attaway. TK picks up where he left off and Rhyme makes a new friend.

programme.title: The Malibu Beach Vampires
programme.desc: In addition to the traditional bloodsuckers, there are other kinds of vampires, you know...such as some politicians, military people, and evangelists.

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Frank Fearless
programme.desc: An aging reprobate, a rural boy, a large dog and an orphaned baby rhino set out to stop the rhino slaughter. Their quest buffets them between high comedy and searing tragedy, until they end up an inspiration and a conscience to a world in need of heroes.

programme.title: Holy Driver
programme.desc: Father Mike has a sit down with Donny, a Mob Capo and Carl, an undercover cop. He tells them that he and some other priests want to clean house and that they need their help to dispose of a pedophile priest. Things really hit home hard.

programme.title: Nightmoor Manor
programme.desc: Elspeth, a plucky orphan girl turned governess, takes a post at Nightmoor Manor, and meets her brooding new employer.

programme.title: Nightmoor Manor
programme.desc: Elspeth is introduced to her new charge, and discovers both passion and mystery on the moors and grounds of the Manor.

programme.title: Scratch This
programme.desc: Three self-centered sisters failed attempts to overcome their sibling rivalry results in riotous physical comedy.

programme.desc: Richard speaks with victims of alleged electronic harassment, the supposed use of electronic devices to harass, torture, and/or physically harm a person.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the pre-eminent investigators of the alleged crash of a UFO near Roswell, New Mexico in 1947.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets several members of the 9/11 Truth movement who challenge the official version of events concerning the attack on the U.S.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Did the late Stanley Meyer figure out a way to run an internal combustion engine on pure water?

programme.title: We Are Golden
programme.desc: Queen’s University is hosting the 2023 and 2024 Vanier Cup Championship and the Gaels have their sights set on the Cup.

programme.title: We Are Golden
programme.desc: The 2023 Gaels look to take back control of this decades-long battle. Legendary Coach Frank Tindall is one of the greatest of all time.

programme.title: We Are Golden

programme.title: Legacy - S06:E04 - Episode 04
programme.desc: Dineo finally reaches Felicity but it might all be in vain. Sanele finds himself in a precarious position and with no one coming to his rescue.

programme.title: Legacy - S06:E05 - Episode 05
programme.desc: When Felicity’s desperate attempt to rid herself of James fails, she turns to the one person she can trust completely… As the pressure on him grows, Sanele sweats bullets.

programme.title: Legacy - S06:E06 - Episode 06
programme.desc: An unfortunate incident causes the Price family to reunite. Sanele finds himself caught in a spiral and sees no way out.

programme.title: Legacy - S06:E07 - Episode 07
programme.desc: Dineo and Felicity find a level of understanding over events that have taken place in their lives. Willem helps Sanele make up with his mother and realises the depth of Sanele’s troubles.

programme.title: Legacy - S06:E08 - Episode 08
programme.desc: As the police arrive, Felicity’s worst nightmare is coming true. SJ makes one last desperate bid for a future with Petra.

programme.title: Legacy - S06:E09 - Episode 09
programme.desc: SJ makes a desperate final plea as Petra prepares to move on with her life for good. Felicity prepares to flee as Dineo closes in on Sebastian’s true resting place…

programme.title: Legacy - S01:E01 - Episode 01
programme.desc: The season premiere of this riveting local telenovela. Everyone speculates on who will take over the most coveted position at Legacy Investment. The AGM is marred by the news of a corruption scandal.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Night of the Living Dead
programme.desc: There is panic throughout the nation as the dead suddenly come back to life.

programme.title: Hell's Angels
programme.desc: Two British brothers fly in WWI’s fiercest battles, face betrayal over a lover, and sacrifice everything amid sky-high spectacle and tragedy.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: A recovering heroin addict tries to rebuild his life as a jazz drummer, but crime, manipulation, and temptation threaten to pull him back into his dark past.

programme.title: DOA
programme.desc: Frank Bigelow, told he's been poisoned and has only a few days to live, tries to find out who killed him and why

programme.title: Gung Ho
programme.desc: The true story of Carlson's Raiders and their World War II attack on Makin Island

programme.title: Scarlet Street
programme.desc: A man in mid-life crisis befriends a young woman, though her l fiancé persuades her to con him out of the fortune they mistakenly assume he possesses

programme.title: Not Here
programme.desc: Do you ever feel like your prayers are going unanswered? The enemy wants you to believe God’s not listening, but the truth is He hears you. His presence is with you in the mountains and the valleys, and He’s working one moment at a time.

programme.title: Sinking In The Storm
programme.desc: When you feel like you’re starting to sink in the storm, call on the name of Jesus. He’s near, and He won’t let you go down. Don’t panic and obsess over the problem, because when you sync up with Jesus, things can change just that quick.

programme.title: Elevation Church Live
programme.desc: Welcome to Elevation Church. See what God can do through you.

programme.title: Don't Let The Funeral Fool You
programme.desc: Don’t let the disappointment of this season cause you to quit growing and relying on God. Have a funeral for your expectations, leave it with God, and let Him open your eyes to what’s next.

programme.title: A Recipe For Resentment
programme.desc: If you’ve been feeling pulled in every direction, it might be time to pivot. God isn’t asking you to do everything — He’s asking you to stay close to Him

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max informs Camila that he knows the whereabouts of Rosa Blanco. Fausto enjoys harassing Patricia and that he will pay, like Rosa Blanco, for a crime he did not commit. Alfredo goes to talk to Elda, he despises her as a mother, guilt and remorse torment her: it is part of the revenge for his betrayal of Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Convinced that Victoria is not ready to fall in love again, Sergio doesn't want her to deceive herself, as if she cannot forget Nicolás, it is best that she stays away from him, but Victoria prevents this. Before leaving for his new life in another country, Hansen leaves instructions for Felipe to be in charge of the bank; Hansen hopes that Osuna will truly find her happiness; in the meantime, Adelaida bids farewell to her daughter with the same intention: for Victoria to be happy; Adelaida also asks Victoria to forgive her father. In Cantarrana, Genara is curious to know if Victoria would forgive her father, who has returned to the estate; devastated and remorseful for his actions; Victoria wants to forgive her father but doesn't know how. After discovering that Hilario visited Florencia, Nicolás confronts him in defense of his wife, but Guanipa assures him that he will be the one to take his woman away; at that moment, the heated argument is interrupted by Victoria.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: After finding Federico in the bushes looking for something, Victoria orders one of her peons to escort the young Alcoy to the hacienda Los Samanes; Victoria makes it clear that she is the one in charge of her land. Once Nicolás receives his uncles -Fernanda and Leopoldo- and his cousin Eugenia at Los Samanes hacienda, Federico enters the place escorted by Victoria's farmhands; the latter explains that young Alcoy not only threatened one of her men but also found him rummaging for something in Cantarrana. At nightfall, Genara tells Victoria that while she is pining for her beloved, Nicolás is preparing a party on the same land where he proposed to her; Victoria vows to take revenge on him.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Lorena tries to send Alberto away, but he only seeks to break the ice and plays alluding to his childhood loves; provoking even more anger and jealousy in Guillermo, who remains threatening - Ricardo decides to hire the electrician services of María Bonita Echeverri, as a way to approach one of the four suspects with the same last name Echeverri of the theft of the check.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: At the party, fire is opened on the guests but Lorena puts a bulletproof vest on Marco Aurelio, saving his life. Guillermo, enraged, orders Lorena to kill him once and for all. Ricardo goes to report to his mother the result of his dealings with the second María Echeverri and finds Paulina with the bank statement showing the withdrawal of the million dollars.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: In front of the doctors, Pastora feigns interest in Clara Inés' condition, Clara grabs her arm forcefully, accusing her of what has happened to her.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: After coming to his senses, Dr. Bermudez explains to Clara Ines that he has a heart condition. Unexpectedly, Clara hears Elisa's screams.

programme.title: PELAGATOS
programme.desc: Programa dinámico que celebra la música con actuaciones en directo y entrevistas a artistas

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cartas contienen pruebas que incriminan a Patricia y a Fausto en el asesinato de Leoncio. Camila tomará decisiones importantes, sobre todo para encontrar las cuatro mujeres que traicionaron a su mamá. Fausto tiene una grave intención: hay que matar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel le confirma a Camila parte de los secretos que oculta: Patricia y su cuñada María Amelia fueron las que denunciaron a su madre. Luciano recibe un sobre que contiene la foto de Camila niña, con su vestidito amarillo, y detrás, una mujer protegiéndola.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa de El Jagüey, Madre Isabel no los deja entrar, conocen a Henry y presumen que también pueda ser hijo de Rosa Blanco. Max piensa que algo grave

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel, insiste en que Rosa Blanco causará mucho daño a Camila. Poco lo que se sabe, sólo que por una llamada asegura que regresará para vengarse.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Marcelina visita a la Madre Isabel para hablarle sobre su relación con Rosa Blanco, quien fue su mejor amiga y ella la traicionó; por eso quiere impedir su regreso.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ante una llamada telefónica de Rosa Blanco a Luciano, Camila, ilusionada, quiere hablar con su mamá. El Capitán Torrealba la ayude a entender los secretos que existen sobre el crimen. Ante la brutal agresión a Sebastián, Ezequiel quiere vengarla con Fernando, un Aragón.

programme.title: The Juniors y La Formula Imperial
programme.desc: Narra las vidas de 7 adolescentes millonarios que se aventuran a planificar una revolución social, generada por vídeo-escándalos y experimentos médicos, con el objetivo de generar un cambio en la ideología mundial, el conflicto entre las clases sociales y el enfrentamiento con sus muchachas de servicio doméstico.

programme.title: Mi Pequeña Pesadilla
programme.desc: Después de la terrible experiencia y la pérdida de sus amigos, Heather se ve obligada a regresar al Hotel Fear donde Travis se prepara para sus próximas víctimas.

programme.title: Morirse En Domingo
programme.desc: Julio Salas muere tras una larga enfermedad, pero es domingo y su familia por dificultades económicas se ve forzada a contratar los servicios de una modesta agencia funeraria.

programme.title: El Mariachi Gringo
programme.desc: Comedia romántica sobre un joven de la América profunda que -tras tener como improvisado maestro de guitarra a un emigrante- viaja a México huyendo de su vida tediosa y de su familia, para ejercitarse como mariachi.

programme.title: Canon: Fidelidad al Límite
programme.desc: Mariana de 35 años, es una arquitecta que trabaja y es socia de un importante despacho de arquitectos, está casada con Julián de 40 años, quien es corresponsal de guerra. Está enamorados, felices, con relación sexual cotidiana. Son padre de dos hijos de 14 y 17 año. En el juego sexual, Julián menciona que no le importaría la infidelidad a condición de estar enterado del hecho con detalles.

programme.title: Bendita Calamidad
programme.desc: Los hermanos Fayos, Anselmo y Ricardo, están con el agua al cuello. Su bar no funciona, el Ayuntamiento lo clausura y se ha agotado el dinero que, para ir tirando, solicitaron a unos prestamistas que no se andan con contemplaciones a la hora de cobrar. Piden consejo a un abogado poco amigo de la ley, Antonio Orestes, que les sugiere una vía rápida para acabar con sus problemas: El secuestro exprés de un constructor de Tarazona.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.
